subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou seest Thy loved ones immersed in grievous abasement through that which the hands of the wicked have wrought. O Lord! They have turned unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تری یا الهی احبائک فی الذله الکبری بما اکتسبت ایدی الاشقیا ای رب انهم اقبلوا
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for nearness to God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for protection
